transactions.desc: The Dodgers recalled Barnes from Triple-A Oklahoma City on Friday, Maddie Lee of the Los Angeles Times reports.
The Giants optioned Koss to Triple-A Sacramento on Friday.
The Giants activated Susac (elbow) from the 10-day injured list Friday.
The Athletics traded RHP Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles.
The Athletics optioned Barnett to Triple-A Las Vegas on Friday.
The Rockies recalled Peralta from Triple-A Albuquerque on Friday.
The Rockies recalled Thompson from Triple-A Albuquerque on Friday.
The Angels activated O'Hoppe (wrist) from the 10-day injured list Friday.
The Padres designated Waldron for assignment Friday, Kevin Acee of The San Diego Union-Tribune reports.
The Padres recalled Jacob from Triple-A El Paso on Friday, Kevin Acee of The San Diego Union-Tribune reports.
The Brewers optioned Fitzpatrick to Triple-A Nashville on Friday.
The Brewers recalled Crow from Triple-A Nashville on Friday.
The Tigers optioned Vanasco to Triple-A Toledo on Friday, Cody Stavenhagen of The Athletic reports.
The Tigers activated Seaboard (ankle) from the 15-day injured list Friday, Cody Stavenhagen of The Athletic reports.
The Orioles designated Roa for assignment Friday, Roch Kubatko of MASNSports.com reports.
The Orioles acquired Nunez from the Athletics in exchange for cash considerations Friday, Roch Kubatko of MASNSports.com reports.
The Nationals recalled Alvarez from Triple-A Rochester on Friday.
The Rays designated Brooks for assignment Friday, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.
The Rays recalled Martin from Triple-A Durham on Friday, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.

Hess (undisclosed) was reinstated from the 7-day injured list and pitched 1.1 innings, allowing one run on three hits while striking out one batter with Double-A Somerset on Thursday, Matt Kardos of Double-A Somerset's official site reports.
Martinez was optioned to Triple-A Salt Lake on Thursday, Jeff Fletcher of The Orange County Register reports.
Brogdon cleared waivers Thursday and accepted his outright assignment to Triple-A Columbus, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.
The Nationals optioned Kent to Triple-A Rochester on Thursday.
The Seattle Mariners traded LHP José Suarez to the Athletics.
The Athletics designated Perez for assignment Thursday.
The Athletics acquired Suarez from the Mariners on Thursday in exchange for cash considerations.
The Mariners optioned Simpson to Triple-A Tacoma on Thursday.
The Mariners activated Ferrer from the paternity leave list Thursday.
Seattle recalled Pereda from Triple-A Tacoma on Thursday.
The Rockies recalled Gordon from Triple-A Albuquerque on Thursday, Thomas Harding of MLB.com reports.
